linear_equations.description: Solve simple linear equations where x is unknown, for example equations like ax + b = c.

simple_inequalities.description: Solve basic inequalities using integers between 1 and 20, for example ax + b > c.

two_step_equations.description: Solve two-step equations requiring two operations to isolate x, for example ax - b = c.

multiplication_equations.description: Solve equations where x is multiplied by a constant, for example ax = b.

subtraction_equations.description: Solve equations involving subtraction where x is unknown, for example x - a = b.
